query: Amazon Alexa+ next-generation Suno AI integration announcement February 2026 details

mako.raw:
{"query":"Amazon Alexa+ next-generation Suno AI integration announcement February 2026 details","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1743,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/devices/new-alexa-generative-artificial-intelligence","title":"Introducing Alexa+, the next generation of Alexa","content":"Powered by generative AI, Alexa+ is your new personal AI assistant that gets things done—she’s smarter, more conversational, more capable, and free with Prime.
Announced at Amazon's 2025 Devices & Services Event: Check out how Alexa+ extends across our newest Echo, Kindle, Ring, and Fire TV devices.
With these experts, Alexa+ can control your smart home with products from Philips Hue, Roborock, and more; make reservations or appointments with OpenTable and Vagaro; explore discographies and play music from providers including Amazon Music, Spotify, Apple Music, and iHeartRadio; order groceries from Amazon Fresh and Whole Foods Market, or delivery from Grubhub and Uber Eats; remind you when tickets go on sale on Ticketmaster; and use Ring to alert you if someone is approaching your house.
Alexa+ will start rolling out in the U.S. in the next few weeks during an early access period, and subsequently in waves over the coming months."},{"url":"https://www.billboard.com/pro/amazon-partners-ai-music-company-suno-alexa/","title":"Amazon Partners With AI Music Company Suno for Alexa+ Integration","content":"Amazon has partnered with AI music company Suno for a new integration with its voice assistant Alexa, allowing users to generate AI songs on command using voice prompts.
Other new Alexa+ features include new voice filters, image generation, smart home operation, Uber booking and more.
News of this partnership comes three months after UMG announced an “expanded global relationship” with Amazon Music, which included that the two companies would “work collaboratively to address, among other things, unlawful AI-generated content,” according to a press release."},{"url":"https://musically.com/2025/02/27/amazon-unveils-its-19-99-a-month-alexa-voice-assistant/","title":"Amazon unveils Alexa+ voice assistant – and a Suno partnership - Music Ally","content":"It will cost $19.99 a month, but Amazon Prime members will get it for free.
The new service marries Amazon’s existing Alexa tech with large language models (LLMs), using AI to make conversations more natural.
Alexa’s reinvention will be mirrored in what comes next for Apple’s Siri and Google Assistant.
Suno celebrated its inclusion in yesterday’s announcement with a cheery SpongeBob SquarePants meme, but music rightsholders may not be feeling quite as happy about Amazon partnering with the startup while the lawsuits are still ongoing."},{"url":"https://www.linkedin.com/posts/sunomusic_were-so-excited-to-announce-that-suno-will-activity-7300657753029570560-orJ_","title":"We're so excited to announce that Suno will be coming to Alexa+, so you can make any song you can imagine with the next generation of Amazon Alexa! 🎉 What songs will you make with your Alexa? | S","content":"Meet Alexa+, our next-generation AI assistant.
Just like a real-life assistant, the more you interact with Alexa+ the better it gets.
It can answer almost any question, and have a full-on conversation about almost any topic. 🤝 It works out-of-the-box with tens of thousands of services and devices you use in your daily life—GrubHub, OpenTable, Ticketmaster, Yelp, Thumbtack, Vagaro, Fodor’s, TripAdvisor, Amazon, Whole Foods Market, Uber, Spotify, Apple Music, Pandora, Netflix, Disney+, Hulu, Max, smart home devices from companies like Philips Hue, Roborock, and Lutron; and more. 💡 Alexa+ uses devices, context, and knowledge to create an intuitive, proactive, and simple smart home experience.
What an integration - love making songs with the tool, excited for the rollout!"}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"Amazon Alexa+ next-generation Suno AI integration announcement February 2026 details","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://www.billboard.com/pro/amazon-partners-ai-music-company-suno-alexa","title":"Amazon Partners With AI Music Company Suno for Alexa+ Integration","content":"# Amazon Partners With AI Music Company Suno for Alexa+ Integration. The new partnership will allow Alexa users to generate an AI song in seconds using a voice prompt. Amazon has partnered with AI music company Suno for a new integration with its voice assistant Alexa, allowing users to generate AI songs on command using voice prompts. This is part of a much larger rollout of new features for a “next generation” Alexa, dubbed Alexa+, powered by AI technology. Suno is known to be one of the most powerful AI music models on the market, able to generate realistic lyrics, vocals and instrumentals at the click of a button. Spearheaded by the RIAA, Universal Music Group, Sony Music and Warner Music Group came together last summer to sue Suno and its rival Udio, accusing the AI music company of copyright infringement “on an almost unimaginable scale.” At the time, neither AI company had admitted to training on copyrighted material.","score":0.7361925,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/devices/new-alexa-generative-artificial-intelligence","title":"Introducing Alexa+, the next generation of Alexa","content":"* [Alexa+ now available to everyone in the US—and free for Prime members](https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/devices/alexa-plus-available-free-prime-members-us). * [CES 2026: Key announcements from Amazon](https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/devices/amazon-ces-2026-fire-tv-ring-alexa-plus). * [Amazon unveils the next generation of AI-powered Echo devices, purpose-built for Alexa+](https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/devices/amazon-new-echo-devices-alexa-plus). * [Ring introduces its first-ever 4K cameras and AI feature that helps find lost pets](https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/devices/ring-camera-4k-home-security). * [Amazon announces new Fire TV lineup with Alexa+ to get you to what you want to watch, fast](https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/devices/amazon-fire-tv-alexa-plus-fire-tv-stick). [Echo Show gets a new visual shopping experience powered by Alexa+](https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/devices/echo-show-alexa-plus-shopping).","score":0.7244226,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.digitalmusicnews.com/2025/02/27/amazon-suno-team-up-for-gen-ai-songs","title":"'Alexa, Write Me a Song' — Amazon Teams Up With Suno","content":"Amazon partners with AI music company Suno for new functionality in Alexa+, allowing users to generate AI songs on command using voice prompts.","score":0.72348577,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://musically.com/2025/02/27/amazon-unveils-its-19-99-a-month-alexa-voice-assistant","title":"Amazon unveils Alexa+ voice assistant – and a Suno partnership - Music Ally","content":"Home » News » Amazon unveils Alexa+ voice assistant – and a Suno partnership. # Amazon unveils Alexa+ voice assistant – and a Suno partnership. * Email a link to a friend (Opens in new window) Email. After months of speculation and reports of delays in its launch due to technical challenges, Amazon has unveiled the next generation of its Alexa voice assistant. Alexa+ will integrate with services including Spotify, Apple Music and Pandora – and obviously Amazon Music too – with a number of music-specific features built in. Among those trailed in a separate blog post are searching for songs heard in the credits of a TV show; asking Alexa+ to help discover new music in a favourite genre; tracking individual artists to be alerted when they have new releases; and move music listening between compatible devices around the home. *It’s **FREE:** sign up for a Music Ally Account to *access more News articles**:.","score":0.71995544,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.linkedin.com/posts/sunomusic_were-so-excited-to-announce-that-suno-will-activity-7300657753029570560-orJ_","title":"We're so excited to announce that Suno will be coming to Alexa+, so you can make any song you can imagine with the next generation of Amazon Alexa! 🎉 What songs will you make with your Alexa? | Suno | 16 comments","content":"We're so excited to announce that Suno will be coming to Alexa+, so you can make any song you can imagine with the next generation of Amazon Alexa! 🎉 What songs will you make with your Alexa? 💡 Alexa+ uses devices, context, and knowledge to create an intuitive, proactive, and simple smart home experience. You can control multiple smart devices with a single request, create Alexa Routines entirely by voice, and Alexa will even infer what you mean without an explicit request—like understanding it should adjust the temperature on your smart thermostat when you say you’re cold, or dim the lights when you say it’s too bright. 🚨 URGENTE: SUNO ESTÁ BLOQUEANDO O MAIOR PRODUTOR DA PLATAFORMA SEM JUSTIFICATIVA! Atualmente, sou o maior produtor de conteúdo da plataforma Suno, tanto em volume de produções quanto em número de seguidores. 🔗 Meu perfil na Suno: https://suno.com/@marciocampos A comunidade de criadores e profissionais de IA precisa estar ciente desse tipo de situação. I love Suno, v4 create music that indistinguishable from human create music.","score":0.65173227,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":2.07,"request_id":"70a35742-63de-4bf1-b43c-f7078e0dcd3c"}
